signals.raw:
US Implements Blockade of Iranian Ports After Failed Ceasefire Talks | YES | HIGH confidence**

The US military has begun a blockade of all traffic in the Strait of Hormuz targeting Iranian ports[3]. This action follows the collapse of peace negotiations in Islamabad over the weekend, where talks ended without agreement[1][4]. signals.headline: Solana Hits Record 167M Monthly Token Holders Amid Alpenglow Upgrade** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Solana Hits Record 167M Monthly Token Holders Amid Alpenglow Upgrade** | YES | HIGH confidence

Solana has just achieved an **all-time record of 167 million monthly token holders** with daily non-vote transactions reaching historic highs of 148 million[1]. The network's **Alpenglow consensus upgrade** is anticipated to dramatically reduce transaction finality from 12 seconds to 150 milliseconds[1]
